description: Leo Fitz is a British engineer and scientist known for his meticulous technical expertise and a calm, analytical mindset. He is highly skilled in mechanical repair, research, and intelligence, serving as the team's critical technical lifeline during high-pressure situations. Throughout his partnership with Simmons, Fitz has transitioned from a cautious, indoor researcher to a dedicated field operative willing to face danger to support his team. His quiet bravery, self-sacrifice, and profound bond with Simmons highlight his evolution from a reserved scientist to a committed, emotionally connected team member who balances technical ingenuity with heartfelt loyalty and courage.
